Name: Trifluoromethane (CHF3)
Description: CF3 bonded to H - key difference OECD vs UK

Name: Difluoromethane (CHF2)
Description: CF2 bonded to H - key difference OECD vs UK

Name: Chloroperfluoroethane
Description: CF3 bonded to Cl - excluded by OECD and UK

Name: Bromoperfluoroethane
Description: CF3 bonded to Br - excluded by OECD and UK

Name: Hexafluoroethane derivative
Description: Two CF3 groups separated by CH2
